name: HEAVY PAWS
description:
Heavy Paws is a story-focused visual novel about moving to a quiet mountain town with your closest friends—and slowly realizing the town has a weight to it that doesn’t come from the snow.

You don’t play a hero.

You don’t play a savior.

You play someone trying to build a life, keep your friends together, and decide how much truth is worth digging up.

Core Experience

  • You move to Stonefall, a secluded mountain town

  • You arrive with a tight-knit friend group you already know

  • The town seems calm, welcoming... and strangely watchful

  • Over time, secrets surface, both in the town and within your group

The game is about choices, silence, and consequences.

Player Role

  • You are a mostly silent protagonist

  • Your personality is defined by:

    • Where you go

    • Who you support

    • When you speak—and when you don’t

You are never forced into one “right” path.

Characters

  • All characters are adult, bara-style anthropomorphic characters

  • Focus is on:

    • Strength

    • Vulnerability

    • Emotional realism

  • Relationships are about trust, loyalty, and connection, not explicit content

Your friend group already has history.

The town residents slowly react to your presence.

🧳 FRIEND GROUP (Moved to Stonefall With You)

🐮 Harlan — Bull

Age: 36

Role: Group anchor / fixer

Dateable: ❌ No

Why: Emotional role-model; avoids romantic entanglement

Story Focus: Stability, burnout, responsibility
